name: Snoball
description:
Snoball helps generate referrals, create more marketing assets and helps collecting reviews from your audience. The platform automates the process of turning your satisfied customers into referring customers. This software complements existing review generation and reputation-building tools to boost your word of mouth marketing.

‍

Features:

➡️Customer acquisition

➡️Review collection

➡️Reputation promotion

➡️Refferal generation 

➡️Review response templates and tools

Pros:

✅Comes with in-built review response templates

✅Great customer support 

✅User friendly support 

Cons:

❌Issues with uploading data at times 

❌Too pricey 

❌Not very cost-effective as compared to its competitors

❌Provides limited features

Priced at 499$ Per Month
what_people_say:
“Snoball is one of the most user-friendly review platforms I've used--the dashboard and features are easy to understand and use, and there's a lot of different capabilities. The site works well, and the staff is very friendly and helpful.”

“Took weeks to get me connected to someone and still struggling a little bit to know who to speak with. Overall they're getting things done, but the dashboard needs help and customer service is just a tad above average.”

*Review sourced and cited by G2*
